section.name: Alpha Notice
section.p: ⚠ This plugin is in early-phase development (alpha). APIs, configuration schemas, HST component interfaces, and JCR node types are subject to change without notice between releases. Do not treat any aspect of this plugin as stable until a non-SNAPSHOT version is published to Bloomreach Forge.

section.name: Page Model API endpoint
section.p: Every Discovery component writes the same data to request.setModel() and request.setAttribute(), so headless delivery sees the same payload as FTL rendering.

section.name: TypeScript interfaces
section.p: These are the primary shapes SPA projects normally copy into a shared discovery.types.ts file.

tr.td: widgetId, contextProductId, contextPageType, limit, fields, filter

section.name: Component examples
section.p: The repository guide contains fuller examples; the snippets below show the typical integration points.

section.name: Error states

tr.td: product is null and pid is an empty string.
labelConnected=false and grid/facet models are empty.
The server throws a typed exception and the component renders an error state.

section.p: React code should treat nullable models as the normal contract rather than an exceptional case.
